positiveText: A high-fidelity artistic enhancement of the reference painting. Retain the hand-painted texture and brushwork style without any realistic or photographic smoothing. Focus on enriching the color gradients and micro-shading to create more depth within the artistic style. Add subtle, intricate textures characteristic of professional media (such as paper grain or canvas weave). Increase the level of detail in the focal points by adding refined, layered brushstrokes, making the artwork look like a high-resolution, meticulously crafted digital painting that stays true to its original non-realistic roots.
